helpers.close_before_close: Closes all orders minutes before market close.
helpers.consistency: Prop Firm rule: single day profit cannot exceed 30-50% of total test profit.
helpers.day_trade_only: Ensures no position stays open for the next day (Swing).
helpers.max_daily_loss: Blocks new entries if limit hit. Priority over global limit.
helpers.max_trades_per_day: Prevents overtrading by limiting execution count during session.
helpers.profit_target: Protects financial goal. Upon reaching, system blocks new orders to preserve gain.
helpers.rule_50_percent: Safety lock preventing return of 50% of day's max profit (Daily Trailing Stop).
helpers.sum_contracts: Max open contracts (total position) summing selected assets.
